summary: Tested strict data isolation for Merchant CRM. 8/9 backend tests passed. One issue found: org_admin's inbox threads show John's Mayer client due to historical conversation data inconsistency.

critical.issue: org_admin sees John's Mayer client (74654ebf) in inbox threads. Root cause: 4 conversations exist in DB with org_admin's user_id but linked to John's client (created before strict isolation was implemented).
critical.rca: The get_inbox_threads function correctly filters by user_id in conversations collection, but there are 4 historical conversations with user_id=dc589ed5 (org_admin) but client_id=74654ebf (John's Mayer). This is a data inconsistency, not a code bug.
critical.suggested_fix: Either: 1) Clean up inconsistent conversation data, OR 2) Modify get_inbox_threads to also filter by client ownership (join with clients collection to verify client.user_id matches)

action_items: Fix inbox threads data isolation: Either clean up inconsistent conversation data OR modify get_inbox_threads to filter by client ownership
Consider adding a data migration script to fix historical conversation data where user_id doesn't match the client's owner
critical_code_review_comments: get_inbox_threads (line 5330) filters conversations by user_id but doesn't verify the client belongs to the user. This allows threads to appear for clients the user doesn't own if they have historical conversations.
Consider adding a join/lookup to verify client.user_id matches the accessible_ids in get_inbox_threads
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strict data isolation is mostly working. org_admin sees only 1 client and 1 phone number (correct). However, inbox threads show 2 entries due to 4 historical conversations with org_admin's user_id but linked to John's client. The code logic is correct - this is a data inconsistency issue that needs cleanup or a code change to filter by client ownership.

org_admin_clients_isolation.GET /api/clients: PASS - org_admin sees only 1 client (their own Mayer Zeitoune)
org_admin_clients_isolation.client_user_id_verification: PASS - All clients returned have user_id matching org_admin

org_admin_phone_numbers_isolation.GET /api/phone-numbers/owned: PASS - org_admin sees only 1 phone number (+15206833288)
org_admin_phone_numbers_isolation.number_ownership_verification: PASS - Number is assigned/owned by org_admin

org_admin_inbox_threads_isolation.issue: John's Mayer client (74654ebf) appears due to 4 historical conversations with org_admin's user_id

admin_cannot_see_org_admin_data.GET /api/clients: PASS - John cannot see org_admin's Mayer client (e797c27f)
admin_cannot_see_org_admin_data.GET /api/phone-numbers/owned: PASS - John cannot see org_admin's phone number (+15206833288)
admin_cannot_see_org_admin_data.GET /api/contacts/{id}/conversation: PASS - John gets 404 for org_admin's client

api_verification.duplicate_purchase: 409 Conflict - 'Phone number already owned by another organization'

data_inconsistency_details.problematic_conversations: 4 conversations with user_id=dc589ed5 (org_admin) but client_id=74654ebf (John's Mayer)
data_inconsistency_details.root_cause: These conversations were created when org_admin could send messages to any client (before strict isolation was implemented)

mocked_apis.note: All endpoints are live - no mocking
